_comment: Community domain knowledge base — APA, ADA, HUD, and Census guidance standards. Sources cited per field.

sqft_per_capita.source: American Planning Association (APA) Planning Advisory Service Report #596, Community Facilities (2018)

parking_accessible_spaces.source: ADA Standards for Accessible Design (2010), Section 208 — Parking Spaces

community_facility_accessible_entry.source: ADA Standards for Accessible Design (2010), Sections 404 and 405

inclusionary_zoning_typical_ranges.note: Typical inclusionary zoning mandates in US cities; requirements vary by jurisdiction
inclusionary_zoning_typical_ranges.source: Furman Center for Real Estate and Urban Policy — Inclusionary Zoning (2023); Grounded Solutions Network Database

density_bonus_incentive.source: California Density Bonus Law (2023); HUD LIHTC program guidelines (general reference)

walk_score_categories.source: Walk Score methodology (walkscore.com); referenced by EPA Smart Growth Program

transit_access_benchmarks.source: Walk Score Transit Score methodology; FTA Transit Equity criteria

pedestrian_infrastructure.source: AASHTO Guide for Development of Bicycle Facilities (2012); FHWA Pedestrian Safety Guide
